# MDE 1.3.17

## Features

- Marks generated custom app language packs in the Preference language selector, so built-in and custom languages are visually distinct.
- Adds an AI-powered update action when a custom app language pack is selected, allowing the selected pack to be refreshed against the latest app UI text.
- Keeps updated custom language packs under the selected language name so refreshes replace the current pack instead of creating a duplicate when AI output varies.

## Bug Fixes

- Prevents stale custom language pack translations from hiding newly introduced UI text by falling back through the current built-in language keys.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Adds the project rule that changed user-facing text must move to a new language-pack key instead of reusing an old key with changed meaning.
- Adds unit, integration, and Electron E2E coverage for custom language pack labeling and update behavior.

## Documentation

- Updates the user manual Settings page to explain custom language labels and AI refresh behavior.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm audit`
- `npx npm@10.9.7 ci --dry-run`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are published by the GitHub Release workflow.
- Windows NSIS installer artifacts are published by the GitHub Release workflow.
